summary: Tested Payslip UI and Username Collision Fix. All features working correctly. Backend: 4/4 tests passed. Frontend: 8/9 UI tests passed (1 false negative due to case-sensitive text check).

features_tested.payslip_dialog_opens: PASS - View Payslip button on Salary tab opens payslip dialog
features_tested.company_logo_visible: PASS - BluBridge Technologies logo displayed in payslip header
features_tested.employee_info_visible: PASS - Employee Name, Designation, Department, Date of Joining shown
features_tested.salary_table_complete: PASS - Full salary breakdown: Basic, HRA, LTA, Phone, Bonus, Stay Travel, Special Allowance, Food, PF, Gratuity, Variable, CTC
features_tested.insurance_section: PASS - Insurance Coverage section shows Medical (3L), Accident (1x CTC), Life (5L)
features_tested.deductions_section: PASS - Employee Deductions shows PF Employee, Professional Tax, Total Deductions
features_tested.net_salary_section: PASS - Net Salary shows Monthly and Annual take-home amounts
features_tested.print_download_button: PASS - Print/Download PDF button exists and is clickable
features_tested.close_button: PASS - Close button works to dismiss payslip dialog
features_tested.salary_tab_structure: PASS - Salary tab shows structured compensation table with monthly and annual columns
features_tested.username_collision_fix: PASS - Creating employee with duplicate email prefix generates unique username (e.g., user1, user2)

critical_code_review_comments: SalarySlip component uses forwardRef correctly for print functionality
Username collision fix at server.py line 2580-2586 appends numeric suffix when username exists
All salary components properly formatted with Indian number format (toLocaleString('en-IN'))
seed_data_creation: Test employees created with TEST- prefix for username collision testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payslip UI fully implemented and tested. Key features: (1) View Payslip button appears on Salary tab after CTC is set, (2) Payslip dialog shows company logo, employee info, full salary breakdown, insurance, deductions, net salary, (3) Print/Download PDF button opens print dialog, (4) Username collision fix auto-appends numeric suffix (e.g., user1, user2) when creating employees with same email prefix.
